spec.title: Helper binary allowlist schema and hash gate

humanSummary.text: Focused re-audit found the previous P1 fixed. Canonical safe sha256:<64 lowercase hex> observed hashes are preserved on allowlist mismatch diagnostics after report redaction, unsafe and non-canonical observedHash values remain redacted, and CLI assertions now check diagnostic-level observedHash. Existing relative path and helper launch gate tests still pass.
